auth.label: API Key
auth.description: API.Bible API key sent with the api-key request header. After approval, copy it from your credentials page: https://scripture.api.bible/admin/applications

actions.name: get_chapter
actions.description: Retrieve one chapter with configurable display options from API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier used to retrieve the chapter.

chapterId.description: The chapter identifier used to retrieve the chapter.

parallels.description: A comma-separated list of Bible identifiers used for parallel content comparison.

contentType.description: The content format requested from API.Bible.

includeNotes.description: Whether to include footnotes in the returned content.

includeTitles.description: Whether to include section titles in the returned content.

includeVerseSpans.description: Whether to include verse span wrappers in the returned content.

includeVerseNumbers.description: Whether to include verse numbers in the returned content.

includeChapterNumbers.description: Whether to include chapter numbers in the returned content.

useOrgId.description: Whether the supplied identifier should match the upstream organization-specific identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one chapter from API.Bible.

id.description: The chapter identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the chapter.

bookId.description: The book identifier associated with the chapter.

number.description: The chapter number returned by API.Bible.

reference.description: The human-readable chapter reference returned by API.Bible.

verseCount.description: The verse count returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The HTML or plain-text content returned by API.Bible.

items.description: One structured content block returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The structured JSON content blocks returned by API.Bible.

content.description: The scripture content returned by API.Bible.

copyright.description: The copyright string returned by API.Bible.

chapter.description: One chapter payload returned by API.Bible.

fumsId.description: The FUMS tracking identifier returned by API.Bible.

fums.description: The FUMS embed snippet returned by API.Bible.

fumsJs.description: The inline FUMS JavaScript returned by API.Bible.

fumsJsInclude.description: The FUMS JavaScript include URL returned by API.Bible.

fumsNoScript.description: The FUMS noscript snippet returned by API.Bible.

meta.description: The response metadata returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The chapter response returned by API.Bible.

actions.name: get_passage
actions.description: Retrieve one passage with configurable display options from API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier used to retrieve the passage.

passageId.description: The passage identifier used to retrieve the passage.

parallels.description: A comma-separated list of Bible identifiers used for parallel content comparison.

contentType.description: The content format requested from API.Bible.

includeNotes.description: Whether to include footnotes in the returned content.

includeTitles.description: Whether to include section titles in the returned content.

includeVerseSpans.description: Whether to include verse span wrappers in the returned content.

includeVerseNumbers.description: Whether to include verse numbers in the returned content.

includeChapterNumbers.description: Whether to include chapter numbers in the returned content.

useOrgId.description: Whether the supplied identifier should match the upstream organization-specific identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one passage from API.Bible.

id.description: The passage identifier returned by API.Bible.

orgId.description: The organization-specific passage identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the passage.

reference.description: The human-readable passage reference returned by API.Bible.

verseCount.description: The verse count returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The HTML or plain-text content returned by API.Bible.

items.description: One structured content block returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The structured JSON content blocks returned by API.Bible.

content.description: The scripture content returned by API.Bible.

copyright.description: The copyright string returned by API.Bible.

passage.description: One passage payload returned by API.Bible.

fumsId.description: The FUMS tracking identifier returned by API.Bible.

fums.description: The FUMS embed snippet returned by API.Bible.

fumsJs.description: The inline FUMS JavaScript returned by API.Bible.

fumsJsInclude.description: The FUMS JavaScript include URL returned by API.Bible.

fumsNoScript.description: The FUMS noscript snippet returned by API.Bible.

meta.description: The response metadata returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The passage response returned by API.Bible.

actions.name: get_verse
actions.description: Retrieve one verse with configurable display options from API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier used to retrieve the verse.

verseId.description: The verse identifier used to retrieve the verse.

parallels.description: A comma-separated list of Bible identifiers used for parallel content comparison.

contentType.description: The content format requested from API.Bible.

includeNotes.description: Whether to include footnotes in the returned content.

includeTitles.description: Whether to include section titles in the returned content.

includeVerseSpans.description: Whether to include verse span wrappers in the returned content.

includeVerseNumbers.description: Whether to include verse numbers in the returned content.

includeChapterNumbers.description: Whether to include chapter numbers in the returned content.

useOrgId.description: Whether the supplied identifier should match the upstream organization-specific identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one verse from API.Bible.

id.description: The verse identifier returned by API.Bible.

orgId.description: The organization-specific verse identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the verse.

bookId.description: The book identifier associated with the verse.

chapterId.description: The chapter identifier associated with the verse.

reference.description: The human-readable verse reference returned by API.Bible.

verseCount.description: The verse count returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The HTML or plain-text content returned by API.Bible.

items.description: One structured content block returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The structured JSON content blocks returned by API.Bible.

content.description: The scripture content returned by API.Bible.

copyright.description: The copyright string returned by API.Bible.

verse.description: One verse payload returned by API.Bible.

fumsId.description: The FUMS tracking identifier returned by API.Bible.

fums.description: The FUMS embed snippet returned by API.Bible.

fumsJs.description: The inline FUMS JavaScript returned by API.Bible.

fumsJsInclude.description: The FUMS JavaScript include URL returned by API.Bible.

fumsNoScript.description: The FUMS noscript snippet returned by API.Bible.

meta.description: The response metadata returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The verse response returned by API.Bible.

actions.name: list_bibles
actions.description: List Bible versions from API.Bible with optional language, abbreviation, or name filters.

language.description: The ISO language code used to filter Bible versions.

abbreviation.description: The Bible abbreviation used to filter Bible versions.

name.description: The Bible name filter used to narrow the result set.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Bible versions from API.Bible.

items.description: One Bible version returned by API.Bible.

bibles.description: The Bible versions returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The Bible version list returned by API.Bible.

actions.name: list_books
actions.description: List books for one Bible version from API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier used to list books.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing books from one Bible version.

id.description: The book identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the book.

abbreviation.description: The book abbreviation returned by API.Bible.

name.description: The book display name returned by API.Bible.

nameLong.description: The long book name returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The book list returned by API.Bible.

actions.name: list_chapters
actions.description: List chapters for one book in one Bible version from API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier used to list chapters.

bookId.description: The book identifier used to list chapters.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing chapters from one book.

id.description: The chapter identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the chapter.

bookId.description: The book identifier associated with the chapter.

number.description: The chapter number returned by API.Bible.

reference.description: The human-readable chapter reference returned by API.Bible.

items.description: One chapter summary returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The chapter list returned by API.Bible.

actions.name: list_verses
actions.description: List verses for one chapter in one Bible version from API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier used to list verses.

chapterId.description: The chapter identifier used to list verses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing verses from one chapter.

id.description: The verse identifier returned by API.Bible.

orgId.description: The organization-specific verse identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the verse.

bookId.description: The book identifier associated with the verse.

chapterId.description: The chapter identifier associated with the verse.

reference.description: The human-readable verse reference returned by API.Bible.

items.description: One verse summary returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The verse list returned by API.Bible.

actions.name: search_scripture
actions.description: Search scripture within one Bible version from API.Bible and preserve whether the result is verse-based or passage-based.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier used for the search request.

query.description: The keyword or passage reference query sent to API.Bible search.

limit.description: The maximum number of results returned by API.Bible.

offset.description: The number of results skipped before the response page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching scripture from API.Bible.

query.description: The query echoed back by API.Bible search.

limit.description: The result limit returned by API.Bible search.

offset.description: The result offset returned by API.Bible search.

total.description: The total number of matches returned by API.Bible.

resultType.description: Whether API.Bible search returned verse results or passage results.

id.description: The verse identifier returned by API.Bible search.

orgId.description: The organization-specific verse identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the verse.

bookId.description: The book identifier associated with the verse.

chapterId.description: The chapter identifier associated with the verse.

reference.description: The human-readable verse reference returned by API.Bible.

text.description: The verse text returned by API.Bible search when present.

items.description: One verse search result returned by API.Bible.

verses.description: The verse results returned by API.Bible.

id.description: The passage identifier returned by API.Bible search.

orgId.description: The organization-specific passage identifier returned by API.Bible.

bibleId.description: The Bible identifier associated with the passage.

reference.description: The human-readable passage reference returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The HTML or plain-text content returned by API.Bible.

items.description: One structured content block returned by API.Bible.

anyOf.description: The structured JSON content blocks returned by API.Bible.

content.description: The scripture content returned by API.Bible.

items.description: One passage search result returned by API.Bible.

passages.description: The passage results returned by API.Bible.

fumsId.description: The FUMS tracking identifier returned by API.Bible.

fums.description: The FUMS embed snippet returned by API.Bible.

fumsJs.description: The inline FUMS JavaScript returned by API.Bible.

fumsJsInclude.description: The FUMS JavaScript include URL returned by API.Bible.

fumsNoScript.description: The FUMS noscript snippet returned by API.Bible.

meta.description: The response metadata returned by API.Bible.

outputSchema.description: The normalized scripture search result returned by API.Bible.
